issues_found.description: User model missing custom UserManager required for AbstractBaseUser
issues_found.location: Domain Model Mapping section, User model (lines ~197-225)
issues_found.fix_applied: Added UserManager class with create_user() and create_superuser() methods, added 'objects = UserManager()' to User model

issues_found.description: User model missing is_staff field required for Django admin access
issues_found.location: Domain Model Mapping section, User model
issues_found.fix_applied: Added 'is_staff = models.BooleanField(default=False)' field to User model
Updated import to include BaseUserManager: 'from django.contrib.auth.models import AbstractBaseUser, BaseUserManager, PermissionsMixin'

issues_found.description: Missing critical Python dependencies from research.json recommendations
issues_found.fix_applied: Added comprehensive requirements.txt and requirements-dev.txt sections with all packages: psycopg[binary], django-filter, django-cors-headers, whitenoise, django-redis, dj-database-url, django-extensions, pytest-django, factory-boy, sentry-sdk, etc.

issues_found.description: Missing many models from Prisma schema (Branch, ProductVariant, ProductModifier, etc.)
issues_found.fix_applied: Added 'Additional Models (from Prisma Schema)' section listing all required models organized by module: Core (Branch, Session, Permission, UserRole, RolePermission, AuditLog), Menu (ProductVariant, ProductModifier, Allergen, NutritionInfo), Orders (Zone, Table, QRCode, QRScan, Order, OrderItem, ServiceRequest), Customers (Customer, CustomerVisit, Feedback, LoyaltyPoint), Subscriptions (Plan, Subscription, Invoice, Feature, PlanFeature, OrganizationUsage), Media, Notifications

issues_found.description: Missing Django TextChoices enums for Prisma enum conversions
issues_found.fix_applied: Added complete 'Django Enums (Required)' section with all TextChoices classes: OrganizationStatus, UserStatus, BranchStatus, RoleScope, TableStatus, QRCodeType, OrderStatus, OrderType, SubscriptionStatus, InvoiceStatus, PaymentMethod

issues_found.description: Gunicorn and Celery commands used ambiguous paths ('config.wsgi' vs 'e_menum.config.wsgi')
issues_found.fix_applied: Updated production command to 'gunicorn e_menum.config.wsgi:application' and Celery commands to 'celery -A e_menum.config worker -l INFO'

issues_found.description: Missing middleware placement order critical for CORS and WhiteNoise
issues_found.fix_applied: Added detailed 'Middleware Order (Critical)' section with correct middleware ordering and explanations for WhiteNoise, CorsMiddleware, and TenantMiddleware placement
Added complete 'INSTALLED_APPS Configuration' section with all third-party and E-Menum apps, including development-only apps and AUTHENTICATION_BACKENDS for django-guardian

issues_found.description: Missing delay_on_commit() recommendation for Celery from research.json
issues_found.fix_applied: Added 'Use delay_on_commit() for Celery tasks to prevent DB race conditions' to the DO list

critique_summary: Identified and fixed 10 issues (4 high, 6 medium severity). Key fixes: (1) Added UserManager class and is_staff field required for Django custom user model, (2) Added comprehensive Python dependencies from research.json, (3) Documented all missing models from existing Prisma schema, (4) Added Django TextChoices enums for all Prisma enums, (5) Fixed Gunicorn/Celery command paths, (6) Added critical middleware ordering guidance, (7) Added INSTALLED_APPS and AUTHENTICATION_BACKENDS configuration.
recommendations: Consider adding a SoftDeleteManager base class to automatically filter deleted_at in all queries
Add example celery.py configuration file content to the spec
Consider adding django-silk for query profiling in development
Add rate limiting configuration (django-ratelimit) to match existing Express.js middleware
